message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml

actor "ユーザ" as user
boundary "ブラウザ" as browser
control "web.php" as web
control "Kouka2_1Controller" as controller
entity "Restdata" as restdata
boundary "index.blade.php" as index
boundary "show.blade.php" as show

user -> browser : 該当ページをリクエスト[/kouka2_1]
browser -> web : GET[/kouka2_1]
web -> controller : @index
controller -> restdata : all()
restdata --> controller
controller -> index

user -> browser : 検索ボタンを押下
browser -> web : GET[/kouka2_1/find]
web -> controller : @find
controller -> restdata : where()->first()
restdata --> controller
controller -> show

@enduml
```
